label: Prismwake Bedchamber
description: Prismwake Bedchamber is a recessed sleeping alcove set behind faceted vitrified tile, its surfaces scored with grounded channels that keep electrostatic glass dust from pooling along the floor. A low sleeping plinth of fused silicate occupies the center, flanked by shuttered wall niches and a narrow wardrobe recess sealed with dust-tight seams. Mirrored light slits admit the copper-white twilight in measured bands, casting fixed, prismatic lines that serve as a private time scale within the cistern home. Beneath the threshold, an undersill conduit ties into the residence’s sealed cistern network, preserving the room’s dry, lens-calibrated stillness.
